title: Underforge
description:
(Original Thumbnail by ninipou on Discord.)

This is the base icon for the Underforge mod,

Which adds the following,

Undertale Souls
Undertale Weapons
And Undertale Recipes.
body:
This is the Underforge, A mod that adds you're favorite items and more from Undertale.

Which adds the following,

7 Undertale Souls, (Determination, Bravery, Justice, Kindness, Integrity, Patience, Perseverance.)

9 Unique Weapons, (Dagger, Tough Glove, Scythe, Empty Guns [And Bullets], A Pan, High Heel, Toy Knife, Notebook, Hatred Knife.)

2 Unique Souls, (Fear Soul, Hate Soul.)

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
How do i find the souls?

Sadly you cannot find the souls unless you make structures and use cheats to put the soul in there.
  
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
How to use the souls;

First your gonna wanna make sure you only have one of that soul and your inventory isnt full,

Then hold right click with the soul in the main hand and you will get its unique item/weapon.


How do i use the item/weapon?

Simply right click it and test it out.

if you have any issues please join the discord and go to
#bug-report

Other members or myself can help assist you with the issues.

(Please keep in mind that im using MCreator to make this mod and have limited coding access because im dumb)
  
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
F.Y.I.

Please note that the gallery will have some recipes and if there are any varients of the item then i will not list the recipe as they will be the same but with a different varient.
